amended_requirement_text: Include every deduplicated item assigned to candidate_restatement and meta_or_evaluative by the frozen build_universe() and bucket_reason() rules. For the currently bound source hashes, the required exhaustive counts are respectively 7 and 13; any different count with those same source hashes fails closed.
correction_basis: The original 8/18 targets came from a pre-deduplication any-occurrence retroactive screen count. The frozen universe definition (dedupe exact-duplicate claims per question across stage-1 and calibration sources, then screen) yields exhaustive counts of 7 and 13. The correction rests only on source-universe and deduplication semantics; no checker outputs and no Phase 2 outcomes influenced it, and all available cases of both classes remain included.
oracle_review: Codex consult #19, 2026-07-18: approved with the exact-class wording above; rarity-relational phrasing rejected

owner_refreeze.approval_channel: direct chat approval ('I approve'), in response to the amendment ask, recorded same session
